---
name: Incident Postmortem
about: Record production/staging incident details and prevention actions
title: "[Postmortem] <incident-title>"
labels: [incident, postmortem]
assignees: []
---

## 1) Summary
- Incident title:
- Severity: Sev-1 / Sev-2 / Sev-3
- Environment: production / staging
- Start time (UTC):
- End time (UTC):
- Duration:

## 2) Impact
- Affected users:
- Affected APIs/features:
- Business impact:

## 3) Detection
- How was it detected? (monitoring/alert/user report)
- First alert timestamp (UTC):
- Alert channel: Slack / PagerDuty / other

## 4) Timeline (UTC)
- t0:
- t1:
- t2:

## 5) Root Cause
- Primary cause:
- Contributing factors:

## 6) Mitigation and Recovery
- Immediate mitigation:
- Rollback executed: yes / no
- Verification steps:

## 7) What Went Well
-

## 8) What Went Wrong
-

## 9) Action Items
- [ ] Short-term fix
- [ ] Long-term prevention
- [ ] Monitoring/alerting improvement
- [ ] Documentation update

## 10) References
- Workflow run URL:
- Related PRs/commits:
- Dashboards/log links:
